# API Reference {.doc .doc-index}

## Top-level facade

The two classes every user starts from. `App` owns the COM engine
lifecycle; `Document` owns per-document state via `app.doc`.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [App](App.qmd) | Slim facade — lifecycle + window-level concerns. |
| [Document](Document.qmd) | Per-document facade — text, cursor, collections. |

## Collections

Dict-like + iterable + filterable collections under `app.doc.*`.
Every collection implements the `Collection` Protocol.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [fields](collections/fields.qmd) | Field (누름틀) collection. |
| [bookmarks](collections/bookmarks.qmd) | Bookmark (책갈피) collection. |
| [hyperlinks](collections/hyperlinks.qmd) | Hyperlink collection. |
| [images](collections/images.qmd) | Image collection. |
| [paragraphs](collections/paragraphs.qmd) | Paragraph collection with Run element. |
| [styles](collections/styles.qmd) | Style collection. |
| [tables](collections/tables.qmd) | Table collection with Table/Cell elements. |

## Context managers

Formatting scopes extracted from the v1 App. All three live at
module level so you can drive them from any `App` instance.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [context.scopes](context/scopes.qmd) | charshape_scope / parashape_scope / styled_text. |

## I/O and export

Thin, error-wrapping shortcuts over the raw COM open/save calls.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [io.open](io/open.qmd) | open_file / new_document. |
| [io.export](io/export.qmd) | export_pdf / export_image / export_text. |

## Errors

Exception hierarchy every public call promises to raise.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [errors](errors.qmd) | HwpApiError and subclasses. |

## Units

mm / cm / inch / pt ↔ HWPUNIT conversion helpers.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [units](units.qmd) | Unit conversion module. |

## Low-level escape hatch

Raw action wrappers, ParameterSet classes, and the COM engine.
Prefer the top-level facade unless you need something the
facade does not expose yet.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [low.actions](low/actions.qmd) | 900+ HWP action wrappers. |
| [low.engine](low/engine.qmd) | Engine / Engines / Apps. |
| [low.parametersets](low/parametersets.qmd) | ParameterSet classes (CharShape, ParaShape, ...). |
